sections.heading: TNM
sections.content: There is no accepted TNM staging system for peritoneal mesothelioma. The Peritoneal Cancer Index (PCI) scoring system is used to indicate disease burden/severity of symptom burden, and the Completeness of Cytoreduction (CC) score is used to classify residual disease after surgery [PEM-C; 21,74]. A novel TNM staging system based on the peritoneal carcinomatosis index has been described but is not universally adopted [81].
